noticia.texto_resumido: Rate This Movie 10 FT Down Movie Review by Matt Boiselle 10 FT Down – directed and written by Alan Williams, and starring Bryn Booth, Austin Buchanan and Bradford Trojan Synopsis: In a late-night bar, two complete strangers descend into a spiral of madness, and the question remains of who is manipulating whom in his … The post Movie Review: 10 FT Down appeared first on Horror News | HNN .
